name: Man Without Clothes Runner
short_description: Endless runner game where mission is to collect glass coins and avoid rocks. Speed is increasing so try to survive as long as can
detailed_description:
🎮 ABOUT THE GAME

Pants Runner: Glass Coin Chase is a fast-paced, third-person endless runner where your character, wearing only pants, embarks on a dangerous adventure to collect crystal coins! Your mission is simple but challenging: run as far as you can, collect glass coins, and avoid deadly rocks that instantly end your run.

🏃 CORE GAMEPLAY

RUNNING AND SURVIVAL

Constantly accelerating pace - the longer you run, the faster the game becomes.

Deadly obstacles - rocks instantly kill your character.

Respawn from scratch - after death, the game starts from the starting point.

COLLECTION SYSTEM

Glass coins - the main collectible resource.

Magnet - a temporary booster that attracts coins to your character.

Progressive difficulty - the more coins collected, the higher the speed and difficulty.

🏆 PROGRESS SYSTEMS: RECORDS AND ACHIEVEMENTS

Steam Achievement System: 3 unique achievements for various feats:

  • Survival for a certain amount of time.

  • Collecting a specific number of coins.

  • Using magnets a certain number of times.

  • Reaching specific speed thresholds.

Progressive rewards - the longer you play, the more achievements you unlock.
